title: GameChanger Law, Xander Law act on Peptris Technologies Series A fundraise
description: Peptris Technologies has raised ₹70 crore from a Series A fundraise co-led by IAN Alpha Fund and Speciale Invest, with participation from Tenacity Ventures and BYT Ventures.GameChanger Law Advisors advised lead investor Speciale Invest as well as BYT Ventures on this fundraise. The Firm reviewed and negotiated the transaction documentation.The transaction was led by Samheeta Rao (Senior Partner)Samheeta RaoXander Law Associates advised lead investor IAN Alpha Fund on this fundraise.Peptris is an
